metadata.title: Zover International Travel & Tourism
metadata.description: Premium travel and tourism services in Saudi Arabia since 2004. Flights, luxury stays, bespoke journeys, and seamless experiences aligned with Vision 2030.

common.tagline: We travel with you in every step

footer.tagline: Your gateway to extraordinary travel experiences across Saudi Arabia and the world since 2004.

about.title: About Zover
about.description: Leading travel and tourism in the Kingdom with innovation, quality, and a passion for exceptional journeys.
about.segmentsDescription: Tailored experiences for leisure, business, luxury, family, cultural, and wellness travelers.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: From flight ticketing and luxury hotels to VIP travel, MICE, and bespoke itineraries.
services.intro: Comprehensive travel and tourism services designed around your needs — every detail handled with professionalism and care.
services.ctaDescription: Submit an inquiry or contact our Riyadh team for a tailored proposal.

partners.title: Our Partners & Clients
partners.description: Strategic alliances with leading airlines, hotels, and organizations across the region.
partners.intro: Our clients are a source of pride and a testament to our ability to deliver comprehensive travel services with professionalism and excellence.
partners.logoNote: Partner logos display automatically when image files are added to the partners folder.
partners.ctaDescription: Connect with Zover for corporate travel, events, and strategic collaboration.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Our team in Riyadh is ready to plan your next journey with precision and care.
contact.formDescription: We will respond within one business day.

blog.title: Travel Blog
blog.description: Destination guides and luxury travel insights — powered by Sanity CMS in a future phase.
blog.comingSoon: Articles and destination guides are coming soon with CMS integration.

inquiry.title: Travel Inquiry
inquiry.description: Tell us about your journey — ideal for Google Ads landing and bespoke trip planning.
inquiry.formIntro: Share your travel plans and our consultants will craft a tailored proposal.

contact.name: Full name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.disclaimer: Your message will be sent directly to our team via WhatsApp.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent via WhatsApp. Our team will be in touch shortly.

inquiry.name: Full name
inquiry.messagePlaceholder: Flights, hotels, VIP services, special requests…
inquiry.disclaimer: Your inquiry will be sent directly to our team via WhatsApp.
inquiry.successMessage: Thank you. Your travel inquiry has been sent via WhatsApp. Our team will contact you shortly.

hero.subtitle: From private aviation to bespoke itineraries across the Kingdom and the world — Zover redefines what travel can be.

vision.title: Vision, mission & values
vision.description: Redefining travel through innovation, quality, and transparency — in step with Saudi Arabia's ambitions.

services.title: Complete travel,
services.description: Every detail of your journey handled with precision — from boarding passes to bespoke VIP experiences.

why.title: Strength that travels with you
why.description: Established in Riyadh in 2004, Zover has been the trusted partner for thousands of travelers across the Gulf.

partners.title: Our partners & clients
partners.description: Strategic alliances with leading airlines, hotels, and institutions across the region.

gallery.title: Moments from the journey
gallery.description: A glimpse of the experiences we craft — full gallery coming with CMS.

contactCta.title: Let us travel with you
contactCta.description: Speak with our Riyadh team for flights, packages, corporate travel, and VIP arrangements.
